items.title: AI Resistance: some recent anti-AI stuff that’s worth discussing
Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
items.summary: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.

items.title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries
items.summary: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The company is rolling this feature out to both desktop and iOS in all of these countries except Japan.

items.title: It’s not just one thing — it’s another thing
items.summary: This sentence construction ("It's not just this — it's that") has become so common in AI-generated writing that it's no longer just a clue that a piece of writing may be synthetic — it's almost a guarantee.

items.title: OpenAI ad partner now selling ChatGPT ad placements based on “prompt relevance”
